name: Winter Wyvern
description: Some breathe fire. I breathe ice. Auroth, the Winter Wyvern.

abilities.name: Arctic Burn
abilities.description: While soaring, Auroth imbues a blistering chill into each attack proportional to the affected enemy unit's current health, and applies a movement speed slow. Adds a toggle functionality to the ability that drains mana per second while active. Removes the debuff limit per affected enemy. Grants self movement speed bonus. Set Attack Point: 0.1. Attack Range Bonus: 250/275/300/325. Attack Projectile Speed Bonus: 500. Flying Duration: 7/8/9/10. Move Speed Bonus: (25%). Current Health as Damage per Second: 4%/6%/8%/10%. Cooldown: 26/24/22/20. Mana Cost: 100.

abilities.name: Splinter Blast
abilities.description: Launches a projectile towards a unit and shatters on impact, leaving the primary target completely unaffected, while hurling damaging splinters to enemy units within the radius and slowing them. Cast Range: 1150. Splinter Search Radius: 500 (675). Damage: 80/160/240/320 (180/260/340/420). Move Speed Slow: 28%/32%/36%/40%. Slow Duration: 4. Stun Duration: (1). Cooldown: 105/115/125/135.

abilities.name: Cold Embrace
abilities.description: Encases the affected allied unit in a cocoon, healing it while preventing all physical damage instances. From winter's heart comes a cold, healing embrace. The ice slows the blood and allows the spell to better work its curative magic. Cast Range: 850/900/950/1000. Heal per Second: 40/45/50/55 (60/65/70/75). Max Health as Heal per Second Bonus: 2.25%/3%/3.75%/4.5%. Duration: 4. Splinter Blast Radius: (1200). Cooldown: 24/21/18/15. Mana Cost: 50/60/70/80.

abilities.name: Winter's Curse
abilities.description: The frozen unit and those cursed to attack their ally are immune to all damage instances from their enemies, except from Auroth and her controlled units. Cast Range: 700/750/800. Radius: 525. Enemy Attack Speed Bonus: 65 (125). Base Duration: 2. Duration Increase per Taunt Enemy Hero: 2. Max Duration: 4/5.5/7. Cooldown: 100/90/80. Mana Cost: 150/200/250.
